summary: The synthetic packet correctly maintains trust-safe boundaries and opaque handles, but requires follow-up to ensure all downstream workflows explicitly enforce the no-write constraint.

findings.title: Clarification boundary enforcement
findings.summary: The packet correctly avoids approval authority, but downstream workflows must explicitly prevent mutation of tracker state or queue assignment.

findings.title: Evidence scope discipline
findings.summary: The packet flags evidence classification gaps but does not enforce a mechanism to prevent second-hand evidence from being treated as blocker-strength support.

findings.title: Private detail leak risk
findings.summary: The packet warns against private implementation details but lacks a concrete redaction checklist for future packet generation.

follow_up: Add a redaction checklist to the packet generation workflow.
Verify downstream workflows enforce the no-write constraint explicitly.
